scenario: opencode adapter placeNew(component, conceptId) → on-disk relative path, per emitted type. Mirrors placement/all-types.json's byType shape. SPECIFICATION golden.
adapterStatus: NOT IMPLEMENTED — spec-authored target (future Chunk-2 format-adapter work item).
notes: SPECIFICATION golden — no opencode adapter exists yet. Component-root-relative POSIX paths. Same subdir layout as claude but the instruction file is AGENTS.md (not CLAUDE.md).
Plural dirs are canonical (spec §7). skill placement is the directory form <name>/SKILL.md.

DIRECTORY PLURALITY (open question 6 RESOLVED): reads accept BOTH plural and singular dirs, but WRITES normalize to the CANONICAL plural — placeNew always emits commands/agents/skills/ (never the singular command/agent/skill/ alias). So a new command placed by the adapter lands at commands/<name>.md even though a legacy singular command/<name>.md is still recognized on read.

instruction.name: AGENTS
instruction.note: instruction placement is fixed at the component root (AGENTS.md); one instruction file per component.
